40:57.arabic: لَخَلْقُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ خَلْقِ النَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
40:57.english: The creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind, but most people do not know.
40:57.score_notes: Cosmic-scale perspective on akbar. The word students already know from Allahu Akbar, now used to compare cosmic to human scale.

lesson_use.arabic: لَخَلْقُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ خَلْقِ النَّاسِ
lesson_use.english: The creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind
lesson_use.notes: Cosmic-scale recall of akbar — the word from Allahu Akbar, now comparing heavens to humanity.

40:35.arabic: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَعِندَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟
40:35.english: Greatly hateful in the sight of Allah and in the sight of those who believe.
40:35.score_notes: Nearly identical to 61:3 — same phrase, different context.
